zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite d'Avranches於1054年8月19日出生在法國諾門迪曼其阿福朗徹斯時，她的父親Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches28歲，母親Emma de Conteville19歲。她和Ranulf de Briquessart至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1136年5月21日在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯貝也享年81歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾切斯特布拉可切斯特 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite d'Avranches于1054年8月19日出生在法国諾門迪曼其阿福朗徹斯时，她的父亲Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches28岁，母亲Emma de Conteville19岁。她和Ranulf de Briquessart至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1136年5月21日在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯貝也享年81岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾切斯特布拉可切斯特 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite d'Avranches was born on 19 August 1054, in Avranches, Manche, Normandy, France, her father, Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches, was 28 and her mother, Emma de Conteville, was 19. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Ranulf de Briquessart. She died on 21 May 1136, in Bayeux, Calvados, Normandy, France, at the age of 81, and was buried in Chester Cathedral, Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite d'Avranches est née le 19 août 1054, à Avranches, Manche, Normandie, France, son père, Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Emma de Conteville, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Ranulf de Briquessart. Elle est décédée le 21 mai 1136, à Bayeux, Calvados, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Chester Cathedral, Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St Werburgh, Chester, Cheshire, England: Chester Cathedral, Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite d'Avranches am 19. August 1054 in Avranches, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches 28 und ihre Mutter Emma de Conteville 19. Sie hatte mit Ranulf de Briquessart mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 21. Mai 1136 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Bayeux, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Chester Cathedral, Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite d'Avranches è nata il il 19 agosto 1054 nel Avranches, Manche, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Emma de Conteville, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Ranulf de Briquessart. Morì il 21 maggio 1136, nel Bayeux, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a Chester Cathedral, Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite d'Avranchesが1054年8月19日にフランスノーマンディマンチェアvランチェスで生まれた時，父Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranchesは28歳，母Emma de Contevilleは19歳であった。彼女はRanulf de Briquessartとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1136年5月21日にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスバイエウックスで81歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターブラコンチェスター カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.St Werburgh, Chester, Cheshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 블라콘 체스터 캐테드럴
ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite d'Avranches(이)가 1054년 8월 19일 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 아브랭체스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma de Conteville(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Ranulf de Briquessart(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1136년 5월 21일 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 베이우스에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 블라콘 체스터 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite d'Avranches nasceu em 19 de agosto de 1054, em Avranches, Manche, Normandie, França, seu pai, Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Conteville, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Ranulf de Briquessart. ru.St Werburgh, Chester, Cheshire, England: честир кэтедраль, блакон, честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite d'Avranches родилась 19 августа 1054 г. в местности авранчесь, манч, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Conteville, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Ranulf de Briquessart. Она умерла 21 мая 1136 г. в местности беиеукс, калвадос, норманди, Франция в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности честир кэтедраль, блакон, честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
